attributeCollection.description: Represents the content options of External Identities to be customized throughout the authentication flow for a tenant.

attributeCollectionRelativeUrl.description: A relative URL for the content options of External Identities to be customized throughout the authentication flow for a tenant.

registrationCampaign.description: Represents content options to customize during MFA proofup interruptions.

registrationCampaignRelativeUrl.description: The relative URL of the content options to customize during MFA proofup interruptions.
